description: Players ranked by accumulated score (goals, points, repetitions). Highest total wins (DESC). Scores summed across all rounds.

scoring_config.notes: Higher total score = better rank. Aggregation: SUM across all rounds.

config_notes: No 1v1 matches — all players compete simultaneously in each round
Suitable for: penalty shootouts, dribbling challenges, free kick accuracy, skill drills
Core format for LFA Football Player skill progression — drives XP and skill area updates
